setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering method invocation, constructor initialization, and basic method behavior
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more meaningful implementation to Test1() method to enable more substantive testing
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal, so tests are basic placeholder tests

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging instead of Console.WriteLine for better testability
Add configuration options for timeout and error handling
fileReports.note: Tests simulate Kafka interactions but do not connect to actual Kafka broker. Integration tests would require a running Kafka instance.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading scenarios, and disposal behavior.
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed error logging in readMessage method
Implement a custom exception handling strategy for ConsumeException
Add optional CancellationToken support to readMessage method
keyImprovements: Null config and topic name handling
fileReports.note: Tests use Moq for mocking and FluentAssertions for more expressive assertions. Ensure Confluent.Kafka package is installed.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering constructor, property setting, enum validation, and edge cases with 8 test methods
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for business rules
Add XML documentation comments to clarify property meanings
keyImprovements: Full coverage of OrderRequest model properties
Validated constructor and property setting scenarios
Covered default and edge case scenarios
fileReports.note: Tests assume no additional validation or business logic in the current model

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering happy path, model validation, null input, serialization, and producer interaction scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding dependency injection for ProducerWrapper to improve testability
Add more robust error handling and logging in the controller
Create interfaces for external dependencies to facilitate easier mocking
keyImprovements: Added test for valid order submission
fileReports.note: Tests assume basic OrderRequest model with CustomerId, ProductId, and Quantity properties. Actual implementation may require adjustments.
